title: Sela (cargo ferry group)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Sela}}
[[File:Sela_carg.jpg|thumb|Group ''Sela'' picking up [[Cargo container/Legends|Cargo containers]] with [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] prototypes.]]
[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]] utilized three [[Cargo ferry|Cargo Ferries]] named '''''Sela''''' as part of the "[[Arms Race]]" during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Cargo Ferries ''Sela'' transported [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] prototypes to rendezvous with [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|Escort Carrier]] ''[[Hininbirg]]'', headed to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for review by [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. Ferries ''Sela'' came under attack by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] near [[XQ6 Platform]] ''[[Research]]'' at the beginning of their journey, however Imperial [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] repelled the attack.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
